name: Bread Pudding Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Bourbon (more or less, to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and powdered sugar over medium heat until all butter is absorbed.
2. Remove from heat and blend in egg yolks.
3. Gradually add bourbon, to taste, stirring constantly.
4. Sauce thickens as it cools. Serve warm over warmed bread pudding.
5. (Can be refrigerated and reheated for a day or two.)
6. For variety, substitute your choice of fruit juice or liquor for the whiskey – or use a combination – to complement flavors in the bread pudding.
---
For example:
- If you use coconut in the bread pudding, substitute pina colada for some of the milk in the bread pudding recipe, and maybe 6 tablespoons rum and 2 tablespoons pina colada in the sauce.
